nasb.text: For this reason a man shall leave his father and his mother, and be joined to his wife; and they shall become one flesh.

esv.text: Therefore a man shall leave his father and his mother and hold fast to his wife, and they shall become one flesh.

cnv.text: 因此人要離開父母，和妻子連合，二人成為一體。

ccb.text: 因此，人要离开父母，与妻子结合，二人成为一体。

csbs.text: 因此人将离开父母，与妻子结合，二人就成为一体。
